system.description:
You have harnessed the terrible fangs of nature to her deadly array of poisons. Choose this subclass if you want to debilitate your foes with venom and viciousness.

LEVEL 3

Viper's Kiss. Creatures you damage become Poisoned until the end of their next turn. Creatures Poisoned this way are also Distracted.

I've Tried This One Before. You have advantage on saves against poison. Additionally, you can identify any poison you inspect.

LEVEL 7

Noxious Cloud. (1/encounter) Action: Enemies within Reach 3 take INT d6 poison damage. Surviving creatures must make a STR save or become Poisoned and Dazed until the end of their next turn. Creatures already Poisoned fail the save.

LEVEL 11

Cruel Dose. Whenever you Sneak Attack a Poisoned creature, roll the dice with advantage.

LEVEL 15

Volatile Toxins. Noxious Cloud can be used twice each encounter. Whenever a creature Poisoned by you dies, their body erupts into a Noxious Cloud.
